title: hymenophyllum tortuosum
intro: Hymenophyllum tortuosum, also known as the twisted filmy fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is a type of non-vascular plant that belongs to the phylum Bryophyta and is widely distributed across tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Hymenophyllum tortuosum are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections.
